title: How monday.com uses monday.com to maximize efficiency (Elevate 2022 takeaway)
excerpt:
As part of Elevate 2022, Enterprise Customer Success Manager Olivia Kennis took us through some tips and tricks to communicate and collaborate better and make the most of monday.com with your team. :raised_hands:

posts.author: noy_s (Noy )
posts.cookedHtml:
As part of Elevate 2022, Enterprise Customer Success Manager Olivia Kennis took us through some tips and tricks to communicate and collaborate better and make the most of monday.com with your team.

One of her top tips include creating transparency and communicating in context with your team using the Updates Section! Using this, you can reduce the need to email back and forth with your team and endlessly search through your inbox since you’ll have all relevant communications located in the right place.

Want to learn more about these features? Check out our Knowledge Base articles all about the Updates Section and how to communicate effectively using monday.com!

  • The Updates Section
  • Improving team communication with monday.com

Do you have any other monday.com features that you use for effective communication with your team? We’d love to hear from you below!
